channel.title: AICloudStrategist — Writing
channel.description: Practitioner writing on FinOps, cloud architecture, AI infrastructure, and DevOps for Indian engineering leaders and CFOs. Founder-led. Enterprise-reviewed.

item.title: Why 70% of Indian Mid-Market Cloud Accounts Have Reserved Instance Coverage Below 30%
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Not a technical problem — a coordination problem dressed up as a cloud problem. Engineering knows the instances. Finance controls the budget. Nobody owns the intersection. The governance framework plus a one-afternoon action plan that moves coverage from 22% to 70%.

item.title: DORA Metrics for the CFO: Translating DevOps Performance to Business Outcomes
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: CFOs do not read engineering dashboards. Worked INR example shows a Low-tier team carrying ₹37L per year in hidden cost — deferred revenue, rework, downtime, and churn risk. The four numbers that turn a DevOps budget request into a funded project.

item.title: Cost-Per-1000-Inferences: The One Number Every AI Product Team Should Know
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Nine out of ten AI founders cannot tell you what it costs to serve one user action. Worked comparison across Claude Haiku, GPT-4o, and self-hosted Llama 70B. The crossover point, the instrumentation, and why pricing decisions depend on it.

item.title: The Cross-Region Egress Mistake That Quietly Tripled a GCP Bill
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Two line items. One billing export query. ₹14 lakh recovered per year. A funded SaaS company watched their GCP bill triple over eight months — the cause was one region flag in one Terraform file. Includes the BigQuery query to detect the pattern yourself.

item.title: Orphaned EBS Volumes: The Quiet Compounding Cost Indian Engineering Teams Keep Missing
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: 38 volumes, 4.2 TB, ₹4.2 lakh a year — for infrastructure nobody had touched in months. A pattern study on the most common overlooked line item in mid-market AWS accounts, the 10-minute detection command, and the governance fix that prevents recurrence.

item.title: Your Reserved Instance Coverage Is Probably Under 30 Percent. Here Is Why That Matters.
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Every AWS account we audit has the same conversation. Engineering teams believe coverage is 70%; the billing data shows 28%. The gap is the single most expensive blind spot in mid-market AWS accounts. The 15-minute Cost Explorer check and the ap-south-1 pricing math.
